title: Agent Memory Visualization
user_story: As an AI orchestration engineer, I want to browse and search agent memory files on Dashboard, so that I can understand what each agent remembers about users, projects, and past interactions.

primary: Dashboard Memory Browser displays list of all agents with memory file counts
For each agent: show memory categories (user, project, feedback, reference)
Memory file browser (expandable tree view) showing directory structure
Lists all .md files organized by category
Each file shows: size, last modified date
Clickable files → view full content in modal/viewer
Search functionality: search across all agent memories
Search by keyword in file contents
Filter by agent, category, or date range
Results show file path and matching context
Memory content viewer: display markdown formatted
Real-time updates: Memory list refreshes when new files added
Shows Last sync: X seconds ago
Error handling: shows message if memory directory missing

data_source: Agent memory files (user_profile.md, feedback*.md, project*.md, reference*.md)

testing_strategy: Memory browser displays files in tree view
Clicking file shows content in modal/viewer
Error handling if memory directory missing
